title: GS20 AC Drive User Manual — Ch.2 Power & Control Wiring (GS20M)
sheet: Ch.2 power wiring & control terminal diagram
why_selected: GS20 VFD: 3-phase motor power input, 24 VDC control-signal wiring, brake and relay outputs — a drive print, directly relevant to MIRA's Drive Commander product. Page 37 is the campaign-verified rendered schematic page (corpus_manifest.md first-10, entry #17). Publicly published OEM chapter PDF; provenance verified 2026-07-10. Caption chosen to satisfy the production print_translator.is_print_question() gate (an initial 'Explain the power and control wiring…' phrasing was gate-rejected — see CAMPAIGN_SUMMARY gate finding).
license_note: Publicly published OEM literature; ownership retained by AutomationDirect; retained only for read-only interpreter testing.
